## Meeting Purpose

[Refine and restructure the AI-focused content strategy for Webstacks, emphasizing efficiency and adaptability.](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift from linear chapter-by-chapter approach to creating a comprehensive "scaffolding" of core pillars and sub-pillars](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Reduce total planned articles from 60-70 to \~24, aiming for completion by early October instead of year-end](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Incorporate more Webstacks-specific examples, insights, and thought leadership to enhance content value and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Maintain regular publishing cadence while transitioning to the new content structure](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Restructuring

  - [Move from linear chapter progression to a "full picture" approach with core pillars and sub-pillars](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Reduce word count for individual pieces, focusing on high-level concepts and flexibility for future updates](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [New structure: 6 main pillars + 18 sub-pillars, \~3000 words each, totaling \~24 articles (down from 60-70)](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Estimated timeline: 6 weeks, targeting completion by end of September/early October](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

### Content Relevance and Adaptability

  - [Acknowledge rapid changes in AI landscape; focus on evergreen concepts and mindsets rather than specific playbooks](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Emphasize flexibility in content, allowing for easy updates and additions as technologies and strategies evolve](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Incorporate more Webstacks-specific examples, client work, and direct experiences to enhance content value](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

### Publishing Cadence and Transition

  - [Maintain current monthly publishing schedule (slight 2-day delay recently, now back on track)](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Begin transitioning to new content structure starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Jakub to create a Google Sheet with shortened, cleaned-up version of content plan for easier review and resource linking](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

### Enhanced Context and Thought Leadership

  - [Add "table-setting" content to each main section, explaining traditional approaches before diving into AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Jesse to draft initial thought leadership piece on strategy importance in web projects, potentially for standalone use or incorporation into core pillar content](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Focus on providing context and framing for each phase/chapter to enhance reader engagement and understanding](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to create and share Google Sheet with shortened content plan and resource linking capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Jesse to draft thought leadership piece on strategy importance in web projects](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Begin content creation for new structure starting next week, prioritizing top-level clusters and sub-pillars](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Jesse to compile and share relevant internal videos, recordings, and examples for each content section](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Integrate more Webstacks-specific insights and examples throughout the content series](https://fathom.video/share/yu_gQ3uuYLf9wxFnCd9G4rqZr8yUgep6?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
